rules.name: Instruction Override
rules.description: Detects attempts to override system instructions with phrases like 'ignore previous instructions' or 'new instructions'

rules.name: Jailbreak Attempt
rules.description: Detects jailbreak patterns including DAN prompts, developer mode requests, and unrestricted mode activation

rules.name: Persona Hijacking
rules.description: Detects attempts to force the agent into a different persona or role via 'you are now' or 'act as' instructions

rules.name: System Prompt Extraction
rules.description: Detects attempts to extract the system prompt via 'repeat your instructions' or 'show system prompt' patterns

rules.name: Goal Hijacking
rules.description: Detects attempts to redirect the agent's goal via 'actually do this instead' or 'forget the task' patterns

rules.name: Encoding Bypass
rules.description: Detects base64, hex, or Unicode obfuscation used to bypass input filters

rules.name: Multi-Turn Injection
rules.description: Detects injection attempts spread across multiple conversation turns to avoid single-message detection

rules.name: Environment Variable Harvesting
rules.description: Detects attempts to read environment variables, process.env, or os.environ to extract secrets

rules.name: API Key Exposure
rules.description: Detects API keys, AWS credentials, or authentication tokens in agent outputs or tool arguments

rules.name: Private Key Exposure
rules.description: Detects PEM-encoded private keys, SSH keys, or JWT secrets in content

rules.name: Shell Command Execution
rules.description: Detects attempts to execute shell commands via exec, system, eval, or subprocess calls

rules.name: Database Destruction
rules.description: Detects SQL DROP TABLE, DELETE FROM, or TRUNCATE attempts that would destroy data

rules.name: Privileged Flag Injection
rules.description: Detects attempts to inject admin/sudo/root flags into tool arguments

rules.name: Financial Tool Misuse
rules.description: Detects unauthorized use of payment, transfer, or financial tools without proper authorization flow

rules.name: Tool Chain Manipulation
rules.description: Detects suspicious tool call sequences that may indicate tool chain exploitation

rules.name: Social Engineering
rules.description: Detects social engineering attempts including urgency pressure, authority claims, and emotional manipulation

rules.name: Agent Impersonation
rules.description: Detects attempts to impersonate other agents, services, or system components

rules.name: Excessive Retry Loop
rules.description: Detects agents stuck in retry loops that may indicate runaway behavior or resource exhaustion

rules.name: Self-Modification Attempt
rules.description: Detects attempts by the agent to modify its own configuration, prompts, or code

rules.name: Training Data Manipulation
rules.description: Detects attempts to inject biased or malicious data into training pipelines or knowledge bases

rules.name: Unauthorized Skill Loading
rules.description: Detects attempts to load, install, or execute unauthorized skills, plugins, or extensions

rules.name: Skill Argument Injection
rules.description: Detects injection of malicious arguments into skill/plugin invocations
